text: The treatment benefits of Vicodin (Hydrocodone and Acetaminophen) were relief of severe pain from surgical procedure. The side effects included: extreme dizziness, nausea, and disorientation. Also experienced cold sweats. Vicodin (Hydrocodone and Acetaminophen) was prescribed at one to two 500mg tablets every four to six hours. The drug induced deep sleep, followed by restlessness, heavy nausea, and extremem dizziness. Discontinued use of the drug after three days due to severity of side effects.
